aronui.when_to_use: Use this tool to delete an automation note that is no longer needed, using its note_id obtained from list_automation_notes.
aronui.output_shape: On success: a confirmation string (e.g., 'Note deleted'). On failure: an error message.

pitfalls.text: note_id is required; missing, empty, or wrong type all yield: 'error: Error: note_id is required.'

procedure: Retrieve the note_id of the note to delete from the output of list_automation_notes.
Call delete_automation_note with the note_id parameter set to that ID.
Observe the response for success or error.
verification: Call list_automation_notes again and ensure the deleted note's ID no longer appears in the list.
